meta.title: UniPower - Your Energy, Your Way
meta.description: Switch to a smarter energy plan. Competitive rates, renewable options, and tools to manage your electricity usage.

hero.title: Energy that works for you
hero.subtitle: Compare our electricity plans and find the right fit for your home. Simple pricing, no hidden fees, and options to go green.

products.title: Explore our services
products.subtitle: From electricity plans to solar and EV solutions, we have everything you need for a smarter energy future.

cards.title: Electricity Plans

features: No hidden fees or exit charges

howItWorks.title: Switching is simple
howItWorks.subtitle: Move to a better energy deal in just a few steps. We handle the hard part.

steps.title: Compare plans
steps.description: Enter your address and see plans available in your area with estimated costs.

steps.title: Choose your plan
steps.description: Pick the plan that suits your household — fixed, variable, time-of-use, or green.

steps.title: Sign up online
steps.description: Complete your details in minutes. No paperwork, no phone calls required.

steps.title: Start saving
steps.description: We notify your old provider. Your supply continues uninterrupted while we switch you over.

savingsTips.title: Simple ways to lower your bill
savingsTips.subtitle: Small changes add up. Here are some easy ways to reduce your energy costs.

tips.title: Shift to off-peak
tips.description: Run your dishwasher, washing machine, and dryer during off-peak hours to take advantage of lower rates.

tips.title: Optimise heating & cooling
tips.description: Set your thermostat to 18-20°C in winter and 24-26°C in summer. Each degree saves up to 10% on heating and cooling.

tips.title: Switch to LED lighting
tips.description: LED bulbs use up to 80% less energy than traditional bulbs and last up to 25 times longer.

tips.title: Monitor your usage
tips.description: Use our app to track your daily consumption and identify where you can cut back.

manageEnergy.title: Take control of your energy
manageEnergy.subtitle: Our tools make it easy to understand and manage your electricity usage.

features.title: Real-time usage tracking
features.description: See your energy consumption as it happens, broken down by time of day.

features.title: Bill predictions
features.description: Know what your next bill will be before it arrives, with no surprises.

features.title: Solar dashboard
features.description: Track your solar generation, battery storage, and grid export in one place.

testimonials.title: What our customers say
testimonials.subtitle: Join the thousands of households making smarter energy choices.

items.name: Sarah M.
items.quote: Switching was incredibly easy. I'm saving around 15% compared to my old provider, and I love that my plan is 100% renewable.

items.name: James R.
items.quote: The app is brilliant. I can see exactly when I'm using the most energy and shift things to off-peak. My bills have dropped noticeably.

items.name: Priya K.
items.quote: The solar and storage bundle was exactly what we needed. Installation was smooth and we're already seeing savings on our monthly bill.

whyChoose.title: Why choose us?
whyChoose.subtitle: We make energy simple, affordable, and sustainable for everyone.

items.title: Competitive rates
items.description: Transparent pricing with no lock-in contracts on select plans. Our rates are regularly benchmarked against the market.

items.title: Green energy options
items.description: Choose plans powered by up to 100% renewable energy sources. We invest in wind, solar, and hydro projects.

items.title: Award-winning service
items.description: Trusted by over a million customers with industry-leading satisfaction ratings and 24/7 support.

cta.title: Ready to switch?
cta.subtitle: Join thousands of happy customers who have already made the switch. It only takes a few minutes.

hero.title: Electricity Plans
hero.subtitle: Find the right plan for your home. Compare rates, features, and green energy options.

addressLookup.title: Enter your address
addressLookup.subtitle: We'll use your address to help tailor your experience.

grid.title: Compare our plans
grid.subtitle: Choose from fixed, variable, time-of-use, and EV charging plans to suit your needs.

help.title: Need help choosing?

meta.title: Solar & Storage - UniPower
meta.description: Explore solar panel and battery storage solutions for your home.

hero.title: Solar & Storage
hero.subtitle: Harness solar energy and store it for when you need it most. Reduce your bills and your environmental impact.

solutions.title: Our solar & storage solutions
solutions.subtitle: From rooftop panels to whole-home battery systems, we have a solution for every household.

cards.title: Solar Panels
cards.description: High-efficiency rooftop solar panels that convert sunlight into clean electricity for your home.

cards.title: Battery Storage
cards.description: Store excess solar energy during the day and use it at night or during peak rate periods.

cards.title: Solar + Battery Bundles
cards.description: Get the best value with our combined solar and storage packages, designed to maximise your savings.
features: Panels and battery sized to your usage

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.subtitle: Going solar is simpler than you think. Here's how we make it happen.

steps.title: Free consultation
steps.description: We assess your roof, energy usage, and goals to design the right system for your home.

steps.title: Custom design
steps.description: Our engineers design a system optimised for your roof orientation, shading, and electricity consumption.

steps.title: Professional installation
steps.description: Our accredited installers fit your system in one to two days with minimal disruption.

steps.title: Start generating
steps.description: Your system is connected and generating clean energy. Monitor performance from your phone.

benefits.title: Why go solar?
benefits.subtitle: Solar and battery storage puts you in control of your energy costs and carbon footprint.

items.title: Lower electricity bills
items.description: Generate your own power during the day and reduce what you draw from the grid.

items.title: Earn feed-in credits
items.description: Export excess solar energy to the grid and receive a credit on your electricity bill.

items.title: Reduce your carbon footprint
items.description: A typical residential solar system offsets several tonnes of CO2 emissions each year.

items.title: Energy independence
items.description: With battery storage, you're less reliant on the grid and protected from price rises.

items.title: Increase property value
items.description: Homes with solar systems consistently sell for more than comparable properties without them.

items.title: Government incentives
items.description: Take advantage of rebates, tax credits, and renewable energy certificates to reduce upfront costs.

feedIn.title: Feed-in tariffs
feedIn.subtitle: When your solar panels generate more electricity than your home uses, the excess is exported to the grid. You receive a credit for every kilowatt-hour exported.
feedIn.rateNote: Rates vary by location and plan
features: Automatic export when your generation exceeds consumption
Credits applied directly to your electricity bill
Track your exports in real time via our app
Compatible with all our electricity plans

testimonials.title: What solar customers say
testimonials.subtitle: Hear from households already saving with solar and storage.

items.name: David L.
items.quote: Our electricity bills have dropped by about 40% since the panels went in. The battery means we barely use grid power in summer.

items.name: Maria S.
items.quote: The installation team was fantastic. Everything was done in a day and the monitoring app is really intuitive.

items.name: Raj P.
items.quote: With the battery, we have power even during outages. It has completely changed how we think about our energy.

cta.title: Ready to go solar?
cta.subtitle: Get a free, no-obligation quote and find out how much you could save with solar and storage.

meta.title: Electric Vehicles - UniPower
meta.description: EV charging plans and solutions for electric vehicle owners.

hero.title: Electric Vehicles
hero.subtitle: Power your electric vehicle with our dedicated EV charging plans and smart home charging solutions.

plans.title: EV charging plans
plans.subtitle: Dedicated plans designed for electric vehicle owners, with low off-peak rates to keep charging costs down.

cards.title: EV Saver
cards.description: Our most affordable EV plan with ultra-low overnight rates for scheduled charging.

cards.title: EV Flex
cards.description: A flexible plan for EV owners who also want competitive rates for their household usage.

cards.title: EV + Solar
cards.description: Combine solar generation with EV charging for maximum savings and minimal environmental impact.
features: Charge your EV from your solar panels

charging.title: Home charging solutions
charging.subtitle: Charge your EV conveniently at home with our range of smart chargers.

features.title: Smart wall chargers
features.description: Level 2 chargers that deliver a full charge overnight. Wi-Fi enabled for remote monitoring and scheduling.

features.title: Professional installation
features.description: Our licensed electricians handle the full installation, including any switchboard upgrades needed.

features.title: Solar integration
features.description: Connect your charger to your solar system to charge your EV with clean, free energy during the day.

howItWorks.title: Getting started is easy
howItWorks.subtitle: From choosing a plan to plugging in, we make the switch to electric driving simple.

steps.title: Choose your plan
steps.description: Select an EV charging plan that suits your driving habits and household energy needs.

steps.title: Get a home charger
steps.description: Order a smart wall charger and we'll arrange professional installation at your home.

steps.title: Set your schedule
steps.description: Use our app to schedule charging during off-peak hours for the lowest possible cost.

steps.title: Drive and save
steps.description: Enjoy the savings. EV drivers typically spend 70% less on fuel compared to petrol vehicles.

benefits.title: Why drive electric?
benefits.subtitle: Electric vehicles are cleaner, cheaper to run, and more fun to drive.

items.title: Lower running costs
items.description: Electricity is significantly cheaper than petrol or diesel, especially when charging off-peak.

items.title: Zero tailpipe emissions
items.description: EVs produce no exhaust emissions, improving air quality and reducing your carbon footprint.

items.title: Less maintenance
items.description: Fewer moving parts means no oil changes, fewer brake replacements, and lower servicing costs.

items.title: Charge while you sleep
items.description: Plug in at home overnight and wake up to a full battery every morning.

items.title: Government incentives
items.description: Many regions offer tax credits, rebates, and registration discounts for electric vehicle purchases.

items.title: Solar powered driving
items.description: Pair your EV with rooftop solar to charge with clean, free energy from your own roof.

comparison.title: EV vs petrol: running costs
comparison.subtitle: See how much you could save by switching to an electric vehicle.
comparison.note: Based on 15,000 km/year. Actual costs depend on vehicle, electricity rates, and driving habits.

testimonials.title: What EV drivers say
testimonials.subtitle: Hear from customers who have made the switch to electric driving.

items.name: Tom H.
items.quote: Charging overnight on the EV plan costs me a fraction of what I used to spend on petrol. The home charger installation was quick and easy.

items.name: Anna W.
items.quote: We paired our EV with our solar panels and now most of our driving is essentially free. The app makes scheduling really simple.

items.name: Chen Y.
items.quote: The off-peak rates are excellent. I set the charger to start at midnight and wake up with a full battery every day.

cta.title: Ready to go electric?
cta.subtitle: Explore our EV plans and find out how much you could save on fuel costs.
